name: Tangy Boiled Dressing (Rodier)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, vinegar, egg, flour, mustard, salt, and pepper in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly for about 6 minutes until smooth and thickened.
3. Stir in margarine and sweetener. Whisk until smooth.
4. Pour into clean jars (e.g., 1/2 cup canning jars) and mark with contents and date to use by.
5. Store, covered, in the refrigerator up to 3 months.
Makes just over one cup (approximately 1/3 of the original recipe). Each serving contains 2 tablespoons, 1 gram carbohydrate, 1 gram protein, 1 gram fat, and 17 calories. Source: Choice Cooking, Canadian Diabetes Association. 1986. Shared by Elizabeth Rodier in August 1993. Tested with SugarTwin liquid and red wine vinegar. Good with tossed salad and hard-boiled egg.
